Plan.path: Plan > Target Audience Analysis > Segmentation > Psychographic segmentation > Attachment and interpersonal-relational style > Adult attachment (Bartholomew four-category) > Dismissive-avoidant attachment

Prepare.path: Prepare > Microtarget > AI-agentic architecture lattice > Model layer pressure > Foundation model class > Model style mimicry within microtargeting

Execute.path: Execute > Maximise Exposure > Full-spectrum effect configuration space > Substrate effect plane > Informational effects > Provenance ambiguity pressure exposure maximization
